basic_details.job_title: Dr. Abdul Haq Urdu University Faculty Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for 37 Posts
basic_details.short_information: Dr. Abdul Haq Urdu University (DAHUU) Faculty Positions Notification 2026 has been released on 15 May 2026 on the official website of Dr. Abdul Haq Urdu University. A total of 37 vacancies have been announced through the DAHUU Faculty Positions Recruitment 2026.

qualification.details: Please refer to the official notification for eligibility criteria details.

salary_details.details: Please refer to the official notification for salary details.

how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the Dr. Abdul Haq Urdu University Various Posts Recruitment 2026.
Applications must be submitted online on or before 08-06-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of Dr. Abdul Haq Urdu University to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the total number of vacancies for Faculty Positions at Dr. Abdul Haq Urdu University?
faq.answer: There are a total of 37 vacancies announced for Professor, Associate Professor, and Assistant Professor positions at Dr. Abdul Haq Urdu University.

faq.question: Q2. What is the last date to apply for the Dr. Abdul Haq Urdu University Faculty Positions?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the online application form for the Faculty Positions at Dr. Abdul Haq Urdu University is 08 June 2026.

faq.question: Q3. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application mode for the Dr. Abdul Haq Urdu University Faculty Positions recruitment is strictly online through the official website.

faq.question: Q4. Is there any application fee for the Dr. Abdul Haq Urdu University Faculty Positions?
faq.answer: No, as per the notification, there is no application fee for General/OBC and SC/ST candidates for these Faculty Positions.

faq.question: Q5. What are the different faculty positions available?
faq.answer: The available faculty positions are Professor, Associate Professor, and Assistant Professor.

faq.question: Q6. Where is Dr. Abdul Haq Urdu University located?
faq.answer: Dr. Abdul Haq Urdu University is located in Kurnool, Andhra Pradesh, with the pincode 518002.

faq.question: Q7. What is the official website of Dr. Abdul Haq Urdu University?
faq.answer: The official website of Dr. Abdul Haq Urdu University is www.ahuuk.ac.in.

faq.question: Q8. What is the selection process for these faculty positions?
faq.answer: The selection process for these faculty positions is Direct Recruitment.

faq.question: Q9. When did the online application process start?
faq.answer: The online application process for the Dr. Abdul Haq Urdu University Faculty Positions started on 18 May 2026.

faq.question: Q10. Can candidates submit hard copies of the application?
faq.answer: Yes, the last date for hardcopy submission is also 08 June 2026, along with the online application deadline.
